title: Say Goodbye to Sinusitis: 11 Teas for Office Workers
description: Eucalyptus globulus teas can help with sinusitis because it contains compounds like eucalyptol and alpha-pinene that have anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties. These compounds work by thinning mucus, reducing swelling in the nasal passages, and opening up airways, making it easier to breathe. The tea's expectorant properties help to loosen and clear out mucus, allowing for better drainage and relief from congestion. To use Eucalyptus globulus teas for sinusitis, start by drink...
